## Author Checklist

- [ ] My PR title clearly describes the change.
- [ ] I linked the related issue or explained why there is no issue.
- [ ] I updated docs or README files when behavior changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes, or explained why not.
- [ ] I checked for secrets, credentials, and unintended debug output.
- [ ] I verified affected user roles still work, including student/admin flows when applicable.
- [ ] I documented any breaking changes, migrations, or deployment steps.
